title: Bring back the confetti on Portfolio boards!!!

posts.author: JustinThibault (Justin Thibault)
posts.cookedHtml:
Confetti is available on all boards for “Done” statuses…except the new portfolio boards.

Bring it back!!! Confetti for portfolio boards! These are the boards that are most likely used in high-level meetings and we’re missing out on serious dopamine delivery!!!
